title: hedera helix subsp. hibernica
intro: Hedera helix subsp. hibernica, also known as Irish ivy, is a subspecies of the common ivy plant, native to Ireland and other parts of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hedera helix subsp. hibernica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and supporting skin health, among others. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
